category_sources: Official lh3/bwa repository describes BWA as a Burrows-Wheeler Aligner for short-read alignment.
source_facts.description says BWA is the Burrow-Wheeler Aligner for pairwise DNA alignment.
display_name_sources: Official repository and project README use BWA as the project name.
docs_sources: Official lh3/bwa repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official lh3/bwa repository describes short-read alignment with the Burrows-Wheeler algorithm.
